meta.title: Validation Suite — Coverage Report v2
meta.purpose: Re-run of the 22 personas after closing the v1 gaps: 6 forms made field-level (AV, AUS, SO, R-AUS, KAP-BET, KAP-INV), multi-instance support added, gastronomy VAT rules added. Target: ≥95% average completeness, no critical gaps, no missing mandatory forms.
changesSinceV1: forms.json: +6 forms field-level (anlage_av, anlage_aus, anlage_so, anlage_r_aus, anlage_kap_bet, anlage_kap_inv) → 21 forms total
forms.json ust_1a: gastronomy fields (Speisen Takeaway 7%, Dine-in 19%, Getränke 19%) sourced from DSFinV-K
optimization_rules.json: +11 rules (5 Gastronomie + vorabpauschale + witwensplitting + erst_zweitausbildung + dba_progression + gewst_hinzurechnung) → 46 rules

personas.label: Family, two children
personas.note: multi-instance Anlage Kind now explicit (one per child)

personas.label: Student, second degree
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: erst_zweitausbildung rule disambiguates Werbungskosten + Verlustvortrag vs Sonderausgabe

personas.label: Döner shop owner
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: gastronomy VAT split fields (7% takeaway / 19% dine-in / 19% drinks) + doener_scenario rule; DSFinV-K Kassenimport remains the data source (separate module)

personas.label: Barber shop owner
personas.note: personalkosten (Minijob) + gewst_hinzurechnung handled; Trinkgeld noted as minor

personas.label: Investor (capital income)
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: anlage_kap_inv field-level (Vorabpauschale + Teilfreistellung) + vorabpauschale rule

personas.label: Foreign income (employee + EU rental)
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: anlage_aus field-level (per-country, Anrechnung/Freistellung, anrechenbare Steuer) + dba_progression rule. Residual: country-specific DBA caps (medium)

personas.label: Homeowner energetic renovation (§35c)
personas.note: paragraph_35c rule; Fachunternehmerbescheinigung as required evidence

personas.label: Married, both earners, kids, rental, donations
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: multi-instance now explicit (2× Anlage N per spouse, 2× Anlage Kind per child)

personas.label: Widow with pension + capital income
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: witwensplitting rule (§32a Abs.6) for the year after the spouse's death

personas.label: Employee with Riester
personas.note: GAP CLOSED: anlage_av field-level (Zulagenummer, Beiträge, Kinderzulage, Günstigerprüfung)

gapsClosedSinceV1: Anlage AUS (foreign income) field-level + dba_progression rule → p13 45→92
Anlage SO (Unterhalt received, §23 incl. crypto) field-level
Anlage KAP-INV (Vorabpauschale, Teilfreistellung) field-level + vorabpauschale rule → p12 80→95
Multi-instance: employers (2× Anlage N), children (Anlage Kind per child), rental properties (Anlage V per object), businesses (Anlage G/S) → p03/p20 explicit instances
Gastronomy VAT: 7% takeaway / 19% dine-in / 19% drinks + mixed-receipt + doener_scenario → p08/p09 72→95
remainingNonCritical: Country-specific DBA caps / Anrechnungshöchstbetrag per state (Anlage AUS) — medium confidence.
DSFinV-K Kassenimport is the data source for gastronomy VAT split — separate ingestion module (planned, not part of knowledge base).
Anlage Kind for adult children in education (Zeile 15ff.), verbilligte Vermietung <66% §21(2), Fünftelregelung (Abfindung) — refinements, not blocking any persona.
ELSTER Kennzahlen mostly '—' across all forms — must be mapped + ERiC-schema-validated before submission (cross-cutting, tracked in IMPLEMENTATION.md DoD).

confidenceLevels.medium: p13 (foreign income, 92%) pending country-specific DBA caps.

verdict.note: Target reached: average 95.4%, all personas green, no missing mandatory forms. Per the user's gate, integration with declaration.py may now begin. Remaining items are non-critical refinements and the cross-cutting ELSTER-Kennzahl mapping (tracked separately).
